"[21] [Appended, 21:17:10] [7] [20:58:53 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225 has entered the chat[20:58:53 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Need help[20:58:53 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: SYSTEM: Loc from ATTMOCaller Lat(Y), Long(X):38.153490, -122.567590X/Y Uncertainty: 14mAlt: -13m, Alt Unc: 8m[20:59:11 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim has entered the chat[20:59:11 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: 911 EMERGENCY WHAT ARE YOU REPORTING?[20:59:30 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: WHAT IS THE ADDRESS OF YOUR EMERGENCY [21:00:33 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: DO YOU NEED POLICE, MEDICAL, OR FIRE?[21:01:03 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Marjorie, I barely have any service. I'm texting via satellite, but it looks like the ambulance did pull over to talk to us.[21:01:21 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: WHAT ARE YOU REPORTING?[21:01:37 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: A car hydroplane out of control in front of me[21:01:54 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: WHAT IS THE LOCATION? [21:02:58 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: 101 by Burrell[21:03:07 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Burrell[21:03:38 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: IS THIS NEAR SAN ANTONIO ROAD?[21:05:00 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Life west medical is here[21:05:12 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: HOW MANY VEHICLES ARE INVOLVED?[21:05:18 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: 1[21:05:31 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: WHAT KIND OF VEHICLE IS IT? COLOR MAKE/ MODEL [21:06:15 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Great 2 Mustang[21:06:35 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Grey[21:06:51 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: PLEASE ADVISE THE LOCATION---IS THIS 101 AND SAN ANTONIO?[21:09:05 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: HELLO ARE YOU STILL THERE?[21:09:14 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Yes[21:09:24 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: PLEASE GIVE ME THE LOCATION [21:09:45 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: Life West ambulance is on scene and they said that they have also been in communication with somebody[21:09:58 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: DO YOU KNOW THE LOCATION?[21:11:18 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: MARJORIE ARE YOU ABLE TO CALL 911?[21:11:32 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] (707) 476-3225: I can only text via satellite. I'm not able to call you guys. It keeps dropping the call.[21:12:02 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: ARE YOU ABLE TO GIVE ME A STREET AND CROSS STREET [21:13:30 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: WE HAVE A REPORT OF AN ACCIDENT NEAR SAN ANTONIO ROAD--PLEASE CONFIRM THE LOCATION [21:15:31 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: MARJORIE ARE YOU THERE?[21:16:30 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026] Melissa Yim: NEGATIVE RESPONSE/ DISCONNECTING Call initiated: 20:58:52 GMT-07:00 10 Apr 2026Phone number: (707) 476-3225"
